title: chamaemelum caucasicum
intro: Chamaemelum caucasicum, also known as Caucasus chamomile, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Caucasus region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Chamaemelum caucasicum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
